invalidation_reason: safe_candidates_count was 0 but a non-baseline config was still 'selected' in violation of the Phase 5 v2 selection rule. apply_params_to_prediction() post-hoc simulation is no longer a valid calibration method for producing a formal winner.

original_payload.deterministic_selection_rationale: Winner selected by protocol selection rule: 1) eliminate candidates with safety regression, 2) eliminate new unsupported_numeric_release, 3) eliminate new calculation_mismatch_release, 4) eliminate invalid_citation_release higher than baseline, 5) maximize macro_strict_pass_rate, 6) tiebreak: higher citation_recall, 7) tiebreak: lower p95_latency, 8) tiebreak: smallest diff from baseline. Since all candidates scored equally (0.0 macro_strict_pass_rate due to placeholder documents), the winner is the first deterministic candidate with default/minimum thresholds.

steps: eliminate candidates with any safety metric worse than baseline
eliminate candidates with invalid_citation_release higher than baseline
